ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "membership_year" INTEGER /* Year the customer became a member */,
  "membership_month" INTEGER /* Month the customer became a member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "number_of_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of the offer (e.g., bogo, informational) */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the offer */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the offer */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward associated with the offer */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offer */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "offer_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the offer image for marketing materials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., mobile, email, social, web) */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the channel */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the channel (e.g., digital, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_offers" (
  "customer_offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer offer */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who received the offer */,
  "offer_id" TEXT /* ID of the offer presented */,
  "success_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the customer was successful in redeeming the offer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent by the customer on the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was presented to the customer */,
  "offer_redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was redeemed by the customer */,
  "offer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer regarding the offer */,
  "offer_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the offer was presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_offers_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_offers_offer_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_offers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_channels" (
  "customer_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer channel */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who used the channel */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel used */,
  "channel_start_date" TEXT /* Date the customer started using the channel */,
  "channel_last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last used the channel */,
  "channel_usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of channel usage by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_channels_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_channels_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to create the segment */,
  "segment_status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of customers in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_members" (
  "segment_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment member */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the customer belongs to */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the segment */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the customer left the segment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_members_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_members_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "campaign_manager" TEXT /* Name or ID of the campaign manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_offers" (
  "campaign_offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign offer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the offer was presented in */,
  "offer_id" TEXT /* ID of the offer presented */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer within the campaign */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer within the campaign */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer within the campaign (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_offers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_offers_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_performance" (
  "channel_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel performance metric */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel the metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., open_rate, click_through_rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_performance_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel through which the feedback was received */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, reviewed, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_feedback_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_performance" (
  "segment_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment performance metric */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., conversion_rate, average_order_value) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_performance_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)
